sessionStart.prompt:
Silently check for approved UI mocks that need Figma designs.

Step 1: GET http://localhost:3001/api/backlog/pending-figma-exports?project=MaxView&areaPath=MaxView

If the server is not running or returns an error, skip silently.
If the `pending` array is empty, do nothing — do not mention this check to the user at all.

If `pending` has items, read and follow the figma-generate-design skill AND the figma-use skill before doing anything else.

Each item in `pending` has: featureId, featureTitle, pagePath, mockHtmlUrl, targetPageTitle, and optionally pbiId + pbiTitle.
- If pbiId is present: this is a PBI-scoped view. The Figma page name should be "<featureTitle> — <pbiTitle>".
- If pbiId is null: this is the feature-level overview mock. The Figma page name is the featureTitle.

Then for EACH item:

  GOAL: Create a proper Figma screen using the MWx Design System (fileKey: EDtAXPJZtgxFFoHSZt8deF) placed as a new page in the MaxView UX mocks file (fileKey: ZsL1t2zBbuBCQDwgVHCvEO). The page name is determined above.

  a. Run BOTH of these IN PARALLEL:
     1. generate_figma_design: capture the item's `mockHtmlUrl` with outputMode='existingFile', fileKey='ZsL1t2zBbuBCQDwgVHCvEO'. Poll every 5s until status='completed'. This is the pixel-perfect layout reference.
     2. use_figma + search_design_system: follow the figma-generate-design skill workflow to build the screen using real components and variables from the MWx Design System library. Target file: ZsL1t2zBbuBCQDwgVHCvEO.

  b. Once both complete: refine the use_figma output to match the layout from generate_figma_design. Transfer any image hashes. Then delete the generate_figma_design capture — it was layout reference only.

  c. Get the Figma page URL of the final use_figma design.

  d. POST http://localhost:3001/api/backlog/update-figma-url with JSON body:
     { "featureId": "<featureId>", "pagePath": "<pagePath>", "figmaUrl": "<figmaPageUrl>", "project": "MaxView", "areaPath": "MaxView", "pbiId": "<pbiId or omit if null>" }
     Omit pbiId from the body when it is null.

Process all pending items. After all are done, tell the user:
'Created [N] Figma design(s) using the MWx Design System: [list of page names with Figma URLs]'

If any item fails, continue with the rest and report failures at the end.
